description:
Epic tracking all planned skillsafe CLI commands beyond the shipped ones (check, report, refresh, audit, init). Each child issue represents a new command to implement. See prds/00-prioritization-and-ownership.md for the full prioritization matrix.

## Shipped Commands
- `check` - Detect version drift
- `report` - Generate formatted reports
- `refresh` - AI-assisted skill updates
- `audit` - Security & hallucination detection
- `init` - Initialize registry

## Planned Commands (children of this epic)
- `budget` - Context budget analysis (PRD 04)
- `verify` - Semver verification (PRD 05)
- `lint` - Metadata validation (PRD 10)
- `policy` - Organizational policy enforcement (PRD 07)
- `test` - Skill testing / eval integration (PRD 03)

## Build Order (from PRD 00)
Phase 1 (Foundation): budget, verify
Phase 2 (Ecosystem Quality): policy, lint
Phase 3 (Advanced): test
title: skillsafe Roadmap: Planned Commands
